servinfo.title: Brake Flexible Hose and Pipe Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Brake Flexible Hose and Pipe Removal and Installation

servinfosub.title: Flexible Hose
servinfosub.ptxt: Check the following points. If check result is not OK, replace brake flexible hose.

item.ptxt: Connection for leakage and other damage.

servinfosub.title: Pipe
servinfosub.ptxt: Check brake pipe for damage, cracks, dents and corrosion. If check result is not OK, replace pipe.
